news.t: First Trust Announces Shareholder Approval of Change to Investment Objective and a New Investment Management Agreement for First Trust NASDAQ-100 Equal Weighted Index Fund
First Trust Announces Adjournment of Special Shareholder Meeting for First Trust NASDAQ-100 Equal Weighted Index Fund
Two of First Trust ETFs Based on NASDAQ® Indexes Surpass $1 Billion in AUM

holdings.infoBox: QQEW is an equity ETF with a total of 51 individual holdings. The top holdings are Arm Holdings stock at 5.15%, Seagate Technology Holdings at 4.31%, Micron Technology at 4.15%, Datadog at 3.18%, and Fortinet at 3.10%.

overview.description: The First Trust Nasdaq-100 Select Equal Weight ETF (QQEW) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Nasdaq-100 Select Equal Weight index. The fund tracks an equal-weighted index of large-cap US securities from the NASDAQ 100-Index. The fund selects 50 companies that score high for quality and growth. QQEW was launched on Apr 19, 2006 and is issued by First Trust.

data.title: Ritholtz's Josh Brown on the NASDAQ stocks 'going parabolic'
data.text: Ritholtz Wealth Management's Josh Brown and Hightower Treasury Partners CIO Richard Saperstein discuss the continued outperformance of mega-cap technology and growth stocks.
